name: Four Dead in O-hi-o Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3/4 cup olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onion to the skillet; sauté until fragrant and onions are translucent.
3. In a separate pot over medium heat, add remaining olive oil and sauté zucchini, carrots, and celery until tender.
4. Add the contents from the first pot (garlic and onion mixture) to the second pot with vegetables.
5. Add tomatoes, spices (chili powder, cumin, basil, oregano, pepper, salt), beer, and parsley.
6. Stir and cook for 30 minutes, uncovered, stirring occasionally.
7. Add kidney beans, garbanzo beans, dill, and lemon juice; stir to combine.
8. Cook for an additional 15 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly, stirring occasionally.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning with more chili powder if desired.
10. Serve hot topped with shredded cheese, sour cream, and sunflower seeds.
